# Daniel Ari Friedman / docxology

Canonical site: https://danielarifriedman.com/
Source repository: https://github.com/docxology/docxology
Primary public identity: Daniel Ari Friedman, PhD
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6232-9096
Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138781444

This repository is the public research and software index for Daniel Ari Friedman. It collects a curated bibliography, paper folders with README/AGENTS/SKILL documentation, software catalogs, collaborator maps, media references, public identifiers, and website metadata.

## Use These Pages First

- Human homepage: https://danielarifriedman.com/
- Agentic discovery map: https://danielarifriedman.com/discovery.html
- Human search page: https://danielarifriedman.com/search.html
- OpenSearch descriptor: https://danielarifriedman.com/opensearch.xml
- Agent start guide: https://github.com/docxology/docxology/blob/main/AGENT_START.md
- Markdown discovery map: https://github.com/docxology/docxology/blob/main/pages/DISCOVERY.md
- Research domains: https://danielarifriedman.com/domains.html

## Source Of Truth Rules

- Treat pages/BIBLIOGRAPHY.md as the curated bibliography source of truth.
- Treat publications.html as the canonical HTML rendering of that bibliography.
- Treat pages/SOFTWARE.md as the curated software source of truth.
- Treat discovery.html and pages/DISCOVERY.md as the place for API endpoints, source queries, and caveats about public index count mismatches.
- Treat pages/EVIDENCE.md and data/claims.json as the claim-level source ledger.
- Treat data/reconciliation.json as the explanation layer for why curated local counts differ from public indexes.
- Treat search.html, search-index.json, opensearch.xml, catalog.html, data/catalog.json, updates.html, GENERATED.md, and feed.xml as generated or index-facing discovery artifacts, not independent sources of truth.
- Public APIs are freshness checks. Counts can include forks, duplicates, versioned software archives, preprints, or over-merged name variants.

## Current Snapshot

- 117 works in the curated bibliography.
- 110 per-paper folders.
- 50 owned repositories catalogued.
- 32 Active Inference Institute repositories catalogued with docxology contributions.
- 286 public repositories on the primary GitHub profile at last API check.
- 764 Google Scholar citations (h-index 15, i10-index 17; direct dual-fetch, as of 2026-05-16; source of truth: data/scholar-snapshot.json)

## Citation

Use CITATION.cff for machine-readable citation metadata. Preferred title: "docxology: Daniel Ari Friedman public research and software index".
